reviews.comment:
Un lugar excepcional para la atención de nuestros vehículos, cuenta con recursos humanos de excelencia, excelente ubicación de fácil acceso desde colectora Panamericana, recomiendo visitarla 👍🏻

(Translated by Google)
An exceptional place for vehicle service, with excellent staff and a great location easily accessible from the Pan-American Highway. I highly recommend visiting! 👍🏻

reviews.comment:
Una de las playeras q atiende la verdad 0 sentido común 10 minutos esperando pegado al surtidor y ni arranca a cargar.  Con empleados me voy a la de unicenter q es mejoe

(Translated by Google)
One of the attendants there honestly has zero common sense. I waited 10 minutes right next to the pump and it didn't even start filling up. With employees like that, I'll go to the one at Unicenter, which is much better.

reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar el fin de semana porque había promoción con modo para los pagos y no pude usar la promoción porque dicen que solo cobran con mercado pago e Ypfapp. Son re tramposos

(Translated by Google)
I went to top up my phone over the weekend because there was a promotion with different payment methods, but I couldn't use it because they said they only accept Mercado Pago and YPF App. They're really dishonest.
